programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When a woman Mary Beth saved from suicide winds up murdered shortly thereafter the investigation uncovers massive gambling debts and sends Cagney and Lacey after a loan shark who may be involved

programme.title: Starsky 210
programme.desc: Starsky 210

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A European terrorist cell takes refuge in a spiritualist community in the US that shuns all exposure to technology Using the community as a front they plan to destroy a new southwestern US hydro-electric facility and for exposure they invite a prominent TV journalist Kelly Dayton to witness the event When Kelly and her escort pilot String are captured by the terrorists some quick thinking on the part of the ace pilot results in their escaping their captors but String and Airwolf must stop the terrorists before they complete their plan of destruction and flood the valley settled by the spiritualists

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: OPeration Repo
programme.desc: OPeration Repo

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A figure from Nicks past complicates a murder investigation forcing him to choose between reconciling his past and preventing yet another murder

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Envious Grandpa attempts to sabotage a camping trip arranged by Hank Johnson a generous neighbor who has become increasingly popular with Little Luke and his friends

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 86 has amnesia after he hears about a KAOS plot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 313
programme.desc: Hogans 313

programme.title: Hogans 318
programme.desc: Hogans 318

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys try to make some money with some phony pearl oysters but their scheme backfires when a greedy Binghamton takes over their operation Then when Chief Urulu muscles in on Binghamtons business McHale and The Crew put a stop to the whole operation by taking advantage of an old native superstition and some Japanese technology

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Major complications develop when the guys send a chapter of Parkers war novel - Including a highly fictionalized account of his sinking of the biggest battleship in the Japanese fleet - To Parkers hometown girlfriend in an attempt to help him win her heart

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A diamond theft on a cruise ship owned by Jonathan leads the Harts to join the cruise ship to catch the thief

programme.title: Newhart - 615
programme.desc: Newhart - 615

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: New York couple Dick and Joanna Loudon purchase the Stratford Inn in rural Vermont

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch goes undercover as a female impersonator when the agency investigates a series of assaults on a drag-show company

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of DC Liam recovers the probe but he Augur and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A lovely woman helps Kimble escape but hes shot by police and taken in by a reclusive old mountain man who wants him to live with him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes life is saved by a marshal who hires him as a deputy The marshal is headed to the town of South Ford to arrest a man wanted for murder in Kansas The reception they receive is chilly with Cheyenne questioning his decision

programme.title: Young 305
programme.desc: Young 305

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Songkran Festival Ep 009

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A figure from Nicks past complicates a murder investigation forcing him to choose between reconciling his past and preventing yet another murder

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some of the best finishes from 'Shock N Awe'.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alex Lohore v. Tommy Gunn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez.

programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Josh Bangert

programme.desc: Main Event - Sheldon Gaines v. Nate Smandych

programme.desc: Sean Michaels starts the day either training or in the sauna, but his favorite part of MMA is hard sparring! In this episode, Sean shares his tactics for the fight, how he evaluates his opponent and how patience pays off.

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.desc: News off-beat stories and analysis of German and international affairs Dive deeper with our features from Europe and beyond Watch our 247 TV stream

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: The Herculoids
